name: Stormfist
location: Stormreeve Neidir in Tempest Island, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage, you have a 10% chance to create a thunderfist to crush the enemy, dealing 277 Shock damage every 1 second for 3 seconds to all enemies within 4 meters and a final 1110 Physical damage when the fist closes. This effect can occur once every 8 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
